case_title: THE CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO VS. THIERRY EYOUM-DEIDO

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF APR-16-2019 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF APR-16-2019 BY A. JAMES ROBERTSON II. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF,REPRESENTED BY JOANNE ADAMS, SENIOR COLLECTIONS OFFICER. DEFENDANT DID NOT APPEAR. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: J. BERTELSEN; NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF APR-16-2019 - JUDGMENT.

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,939.00 FILED BY THE CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO /TREASURER AND TAX COLLECTOR AS TO DEFENDANT EYOUM-DEIDO, THIERRY ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR APR-16-2019 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF THE CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO /TREASURER AND TAX COLLECTOR RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT EYOUM-DEIDO, THIERRY $1,939.00 PRINCIPAL, $46.05 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,985.05 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
